institution.name: Chattanooga College Medical Dental and & Technical Careers

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Chattanooga College Medical Dental and & Technical Careers fell 48% between 2021 and 2024 (60.5% → 31.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Chattanooga College Medical Dental and & Technical Careers rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.7k → $12.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chattanooga College Medical Dental and & Technical Careers rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.7k → $12.7k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Chattanooga College Medical Dental and & Technical Careers are 10% below 6-year earnings ($28.9k → $26.0k).
